content.problemStatement:
In this problem, we will set up three simple Flask routes acting as APIs. There is no frontend—each endpoint returns plain text or JSON.

### Task - Setup three main API endpoints:

1. Home route- this is the landing page of the portfolio. This should be shown on `/` route.


2. About route - this is the about page of the author. This should be shown on `/about`.


3. Projects route - this is the page showing the projects of the user. This show the given below projects on `/projects` route.
